name: can_resolve_reference
short_description: Check if a module can be referenced
full_help:
can_resolve_reference

Description: 
Check if a module can be referenced

Syntax: 
can_resolve_reference  [-quiet] [-verbose] <module>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <module>    module name

Categories: 
Object, Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
